about.more: More than a club – a community!
about.text: Petanque Club Varna was established on March 29, 2021 in the city of Varna by Plamen Nikolov with the clear idea of ​​promoting and developing the sport of petanque in the region. Since its inception, the club has united people who share a love for strategic play, fair competition and strong team spirit. The current chairman of the club is Plamen Nikolov, who actively works to expand the community and organize tournaments, competitions and trainings. Our members participate in regional and national tournaments, representing Varna with dignity and respect for the traditions of the sport. Petanque Club Varna is not just a sports club - it is a place for friendship, development and shared moments.

contact.contact: Feel free to reach out to us for tournaments, training or partnership inquiries.
